title: Best Presentation at Indonesia Green Jobs Initiative Competition

items.content: ClimatiX is an integrated climate technology ecosystem designed to improve transparency and trust in the carbon market. By combining the Internet of Things (IoT), Artificial Intelligence (AI), Cloud Computing, and Blockchain, our platform enables real-time environmental monitoring, intelligent carbon analytics, and transparent digital carbon credit trading.
Our ecosystem consists of three interconnected platforms:

items.title: ClimatiX Devices
items.content: Collects real-time environmental data from conservation areas using IoT sensors.

items.title: ClimatiX LandHub
items.content: Transforms sensor data into actionable insights through AI-powered analytics, enabling project monitoring and carbon estimation.

items.title: ClimatiX GreenTrade
items.content: Tokenizes verified carbon credits into digital assets, creating a transparent marketplace for secure and traceable carbon credit transactions.
Together, these components provide an end-to-end solution that supports environmental conservation, ESG initiatives, and the transition toward a sustainable green economy.

We were deeply honored when ClimatiX was recognized with the Best Presentation Award at the GreenJob Competition organized by Inovasi Muda. Our project was awarded for its innovative approach to integrating IoT, AI, and Blockchain into a unified carbon technology ecosystem.

Furthermore, we were praised for presenting a practical, scalable, and impactful solution aimed at advancing transparency and digital transformation within the carbon market. This achievement reflects not only the technical innovation behind ClimatiX, but also our team's ability to communicate complex architectural ideas effectively to industry experts and judges.

title: 2nd Place Winner at Business Plan Careerday UNY

items.content: Kami menyusun rencana bisnis yang matang untuk memecahkan masalah akses pendidikan karir di pedesaan. Kompetisi di UNY ini diikuti oleh puluhan universitas terkemuka di Indonesia.

Berkat analisis pasar yang tajam dan simulasi proyeksi keuangan yang realistis, tim kami berhasil memukau juri dan membawa pulang piala Juara 2. Pengalaman berharga ini melatih kami untuk selalu berpikir kritis dari sudut pandang investor.
